text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Gahhh! This sucks! I thought I had it!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
But what a great race! Beating me is a pretty big
deal!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
It feels great to run against such formidable
opponents! My tail is still quiverin' with
adrenaline!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I was clearly out of my depth, which sucks, but it
was a battle to remember.
choice_data_list: You've got the next one for sure!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I thought I had it in me to pull through, but that
was just naive thinking. Now that it's come to this,
there's only one thing I can do...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
And that's to move my body like there's no
tomorrow! Time to do some running to clear my
mind!
choice_data_list: But you just finished a race!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, so now I gotta do a post-race run! Time to
book it all the way home! Raaaah!

I hurry after her, but I can't keep up with Hishi
Amazon sprinting at full speed.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
It goes without sayin' that I'll never give up, no
matter how good my opponents are!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Every second I'm not eating or sleeping, I'm
gonna be training! Or y'know what? Forget
sleeping too!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, whatever! I'm just saying that's how far I'm
willin' to go! I gotta keep training to secure that
next win!
